Created attachment 235170
(1 of 2) upgrade re/rem/baresip to 2.3.0

I made the previous patch following instructions from FreeBSD porters hand book and it does not look correct. The second attempt lead to 2 patch files but it is impossible to attach more than one file here...
I like FreeBSD but sometimes it just gets insane.
Like stone age...
